summary: Iteration 3 testing of Owner role, Profile page, Gallery feature, Aamon leader, and rebrand. Backend: 23/23 NEW iter3 tests passed + 34/34 iter2 regression = 57/57 total (100%). Frontend: All 31 UI checks passed across navbar logo, hero logo, footer links (Instagram/email/Telegram), Gallery page (3 seeded items, category filters, lightbox), Members page (Aamon leader with 236 wins/68 MVPs/Duke of Shadows, NECROLINK_Phantom co-leader, no DarkNet_Phantom), owner login flow, Profile page (4 tabs, edit+save persists, avatar), Admin dashboard (Gallery tab + new-gallery-btn, owner-only Users tab with 7 users + role selects + delete btns). No critical bugs.

minor.issue: Email is lower-cased on register but not on login - login does NOT lowercase email (line ~298). Mixed-case email at login could fail when DB stored lowercase. Recommend normalizing to .lower() in login as well.
Only validates role enum (member/admin/owner) but allows owner to demote another owner. If there were multiple owners, one could remove all others. Currently only 1 owner seeded so low risk.
Filter by email is case-sensitive in Mongo. If user registers/orders with different-case email vs login email, /me/* will not return those records. Consider normalizing emails on insert and query.
(Carry-over from iter1/2) Still no brute-force lockout per playbook.

issues: Owner's own row has no role-select or delete button (correct by design), but no visual indicator like 'You' or 'Cannot modify' - minor UX nit.
Still uses native datetime-local picker instead of shadcn Calendar.

action_items: Normalize email to lower-case in /api/auth/login (server.py ~line 298) to match register behavior - prevents login failures for users who type mixed-case email.
Normalize email on event-registrations/orders insert (or query with case-insensitive regex) so /api/me/* returns all records regardless of email case.
(Carry-over) Implement brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login per playbook.
(Carry-over from iter2) Add data-testid='tab-overview' on Overview tab in AdminDashboard.
(Minor) Refactor server.py (993 lines) into modules - it has grown again from 804 to 993 lines.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 993 lines (was 804 in iter2, 491 in iter1) - urgently needs splitting into route modules (routes_users.py, routes_gallery.py, routes_me.py, routes_profile.py, services/auth.py, seed.py).
Login does not lower-case email but register does - asymmetric handling can cause real login bugs. Apply email.lower() consistently.
Role enum check in PATCH /users/{id}/role is duplicated string list - extract to a Literal type or constant.

/api/users endpoint returns role/email but does not exclude password_hash explicitly in projection - currently safe because parse_user serializer drops it, but a future bug could leak it. Use explicit Mongo projection {password_hash:0}.

Avatar upload via client-side FileReader -> data URL is stored directly in DB (potentially large base64 strings). Should set a reasonable file-size limit (e.g., 200KB) on the client and reject larger uploads with a toast.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_owner_gallery.py (NEW - 23 tests covering owner role, /api/users, /api/auth/profile, /api/me/*, /api/gallery, Aamon leader, co-leader rename)
test_credentials: Owner: owner@necrolink.com / Owner2024! VERIFIED. Admin: admin@necrolink.com / Necrolink2024! VERIFIED. Legacy: admin@darknet.com / DarkNet2024! VERIFIED (iter2).
seed_data_creation: Verified seeds: 1 owner + 2 admins + Aamon leader (236 wins, 68 MVPs, The Duke of Shadows achievement, NECROLINK_Aamon IGN) + Cyber Phantom co-leader (NECROLINK_Phantom IGN, NOT old DarkNet_Phantom) + 3 gallery items (match/mvp/team categories). All test-created data cleaned up after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suites: /app/backend/tests/test_necrolink_api.py (34 tests - iter2 features) + /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_owner_gallery.py (23 tests - iter3 owner/gallery/profile/me). Run both: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://voltage-victory.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. New iter3 data-testids verified: hero-logo, footer-instagram, footer-email, footer-telegram, gallery-title, gallery-filter-{all,match,mvp,team,event}, gallery-item-{id}, gallery-lightbox, profile-tab-{profile,applications,registrations,orders}, profile-avatar, profile-name-input, save-profile-btn, tab-gallery, tab-users, new-gallery-btn, admin-user-{id}, role-select-{id}, delete-user-{id}. Owner cannot self-modify (no role-select/delete-btn on own row - correct). Server.py grew to 993 lines.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no critical bugs. 4 minor backend test failures during initial run were due to test-side issues (email case mismatch with server's .lower() on register, members field naming convention 'rank' vs 'role' and 'mvp_count' vs 'mvps'). All fixed and re-passed.
